about.heading: Burlington landscaping done right
about.body: We're the Burlington team that shows up when we say we will. Real people answering the phone, real work getting done.

reviews.name: Bill H.
reviews.text: Needed unexpected winter cleanup. Seldon came over and took care of business. Nice job.

cta.heading: Ready to get your yard handled?
cta.body: Free estimates on any project. Call us or send a message — we'll get back to you fast.
